title: excoecaria marginata var. stenophylla
intro: Excoecaria marginata var. stenophylla, also known as the coastal milk bush, is a tropical plant native to the coastal regions of Queensland, Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Excoecaria marginata var. stenophylla include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for skin conditions and injuries. Excoecaria marginata var. stenophylla can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
